_note: Sample manifest -- representative subset only. A full deployment manifest contains all 200 coin tokens (IDs 1--200). See docs/nft-asset-manifest-spec.md for the complete field reference.
descriptionTemplate: A Tricksfor Booster NFT. Stake this NFT to activate a reward boost during gameplay. An unstaked Booster confers no in-game advantage.
